scenario: Wren Healthcare runs Camunda 8.8 for an intake platform handling 900 records per day. A new operator opens Tasklist for the first time and asks what role Tasklist plays in the Camunda 8 platform compared to Operate, before any further configuration of user tasks is attempted on the cluster.
question: Which description matches the Tasklist introduction page's framing of what Tasklist is and what it does?

options.text: Tasklist is a ready-to-use application to rapidly implement business processes alongside user tasks, used to orchestrate human workflows and reduce time-to-value with an out-of-the-box interface
Tasklist is a script editor used by operators to author DMN tables, where each evaluated decision is then routed through a built-in queue to the appropriate human handler in the organization
Tasklist is a deployment dashboard used to push BPMN and DMN files to the cluster, designed to replace Web Modeler deploy actions for organizations that do not run Web Modeler at all
Tasklist is a monitoring tool used to inspect Zeebe broker partitions and replication lag, designed to complement Operate when investigating performance issues across clusters

a.text: Correct. The Tasklist introduction defines Tasklist as a ready-to-use application to rapidly implement business processes alongside user tasks, used to orchestrate human workflows and reduce time-to-value with an out-of-the-box interface.

b.text: Incorrect. The Tasklist introduction does not describe Tasklist as a DMN script editor; it presents Tasklist as a ready-to-use application focused on user tasks and human workflows.

c.text: Incorrect. Tasklist is not framed as a BPMN or DMN deployment dashboard in the introduction page; that responsibility sits with Modeler and the deployment surfaces around Zeebe.

d.text: Incorrect. Tasklist is not a broker monitoring tool; the introduction page frames it as a ready-to-use application alongside user tasks for human workflows.

explanation: The Tasklist introduction opens with a precise framing: Tasklist is a ready-to-use application to rapidly implement business processes alongside user tasks. It is positioned as a way to orchestrate human workflows, reduce time-to-value, and notify users when they are assigned a task to complete.
